summary: Tested Petty Cash Correction Engine end-to-end. Backend pytest passes (1/1, 29.36s) covering reject → resubmit → issue → send-for-correction → resubmit loop with cashflow_ledger reversal. Frontend partially works: red CorrectionDialog banner renders on SE dashboard with correct reason text and data-testid, BUT clicking the banner does NOT open the AlertDialog — no portal mounts, no console error. The accountant Petty Cash Management top-level page is also missing the spec'd Reject button on PM-Approved-Awaiting-Payment rows (only 'Process Payment' is shown). Acc-pc-correct / acc-pc-reject / acc-pc-status testids only render in the SE drill-down view (reached via the 'View' link on the bottom Site Engineer table), not on the main PM-Approved row.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking the red 'Rejected by Accountant — Re-enter Required' banner (data-testid pc-correction-banner-{id}) does NOT open the CorrectionDialog. No [role=alertdialog]/portal mounts in DOM, no console error. Verified with both Playwright click(force=True) and direct el.click() via JS. setCorrectionPC(pc) likely fires but the dialog render path is broken — possibly the Radix AlertDialog import / hook order / open-state propagation. SE cannot edit & resubmit from UI; backend resubmit endpoint itself works (pytest passes).

ui_bugs.component: AccountsBoard → Petty Cash Management → PM-Approved-Awaiting-Payment table
ui_bugs.issue: Spec requires 'Reject' button (data-testid acc-pc-reject-{id}) on pm_approved/requested rows from the accountant view. On the main 'PM-Approved — Awaiting Payment' table, only 'Process Payment' renders — no Reject. The Reject + Send-for-Correction + StatusPill data-testids only render in the secondary SE-drill-down table (accessed via the 'View' link on the bottom Site Engineer summary row). Accountant cannot reject a pm_approved request from the primary queue.

issues: The 'Reject' button gate `pillState(pc.status) === 'awaiting' && pc.status !== 'requested'` excludes 'requested' status — review request explicitly asked Reject to be visible on BOTH pm_approved AND requested rows. Either drop the `!== 'requested'` clause or replace the existing 'Issue' button with an 'Issue / Reject' button pair on requested rows.

what_works: Backend pytest test_correction_engine_petty_cash.py: 1 passed in 29.36s (full reject → resubmit → issue → send-for-correction → resubmit loop, including cashflow_ledger reversal and correction_history growth).
PATCH /api/accountant/petty-cash/{id}/reject with JSON {reason} → status='accountant_rejected', rejection_reason saved, correction_history grows.
POST /api/petty-cash/{id}/resubmit → status='awaiting_accountant', rejection markers cleared, amount_requested update persisted.
PATCH /api/accountant/petty-cash/{id}/issue → status='issued', cashflow_ledger row created (1 row).
POST /api/accountant/petty-cash/{id}/send-for-correction → status='under_correction', correction_reason saved, prev_approved_status='issued', cashflow_ledger row REMOVED (0 rows).
Frontend StatusPill correctly maps pm_approved→'Awaiting Accountant', accountant_rejected→'Rejected', issued→'Approved', under_correction→'Under Correction'.
SE dashboard Petty Cash tab: red banner with data-testid 'pc-correction-banner-{id}' renders for accountant_rejected rows, with exact reason text 'Excessive amount, please justify or split'.
Accountant /accounts-board loads cleanly, Petty Cash card drill-down navigates to Petty Cash Management page showing PM-Approved-Awaiting-Payment + Petrol Allowance + per-SE summary tables.
action_items: Debug why CorrectionDialog does not open when SE clicks the pc-correction-banner: setCorrectionPC(pc) fires (banner has onClick) but the Radix AlertDialog renders nothing. Suggest adding a console.log inside the onClick AND inside the CorrectionDialog body to trace; verify the import path './ui/alert-dialog' is the correct shadcn alert-dialog wrapper and that AlertDialog forwards `open` prop (not `defaultOpen`). Same dialog is wired on AccountsBoard via setViewCorrectionPC — likely identical bug there.

Surface 'Reject' (and ideally 'Send for Correction' for approved/issued) buttons on the AccountsBoard primary 'PM-Approved — Awaiting Payment' queue table, not only on the per-SE drill-down. Currently only 'Process Payment' is shown for pm_approved rows in the main queue.
Loosen the Reject button gate on the SE drill-down so it also shows on 'requested' status rows (per review spec).

Consider rendering a CorrectionDialog smoke-test wherever the banner is rendered: e.g. an explicit 'Open dialog' debug button, or move the dialog mount to a top-level provider so portal mounting isn't gated by parent re-render timing.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/SiteEngineerDashboard.jsx is 2585 lines (>700 line threshold) — split into PettyCashPanel, AttendancePanel, ProjectsPanel.
/app/frontend/src/pages/AccountsBoard.jsx is 4370 lines — already flagged in iter155, still pending.
CorrectionDialog useEffect dependency `doc?.[Object.keys(doc || {})[0]]` is fragile (depends on insertion order of object keys). Use doc?.petty_cash_id or doc?.id instead.
In AccountsBoard.jsx line 575 the Reject button gate excludes 'requested' which contradicts the review spec.
Cleanup: the SiteEngineerDashboard pc-correction-banner onClick handler is a div onClick (not a button). Either keep as div with role='button' + keyboard handler, or convert to a <button> for a11y.
test_credentials: admin@constructionos.com / Demo@1234 (super admin), accountant@constructionos.com / Demo@1234 (Priya Sharma), engineer@constructionos.com / Demo@1234 (Vikram Singh).
seed_data_creation: Seeded 3 petty_cash rows per UI test cycle via /app/test_reports/seed_petty_cash_correction.py (pm_approved, accountant_rejected with correction_history, issued with linked cashflow_ledger row). All 'pc_seed_*' rows and 'pc_test_*' rows were cleaned up from petty_cash + cashflow_ledger at the end of testing (9 docs + 2 ledger rows deleted).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid (pytest 1/1 PASS). Two UI gaps: (1) CorrectionDialog never mounts when banner clicked — silent failure, no console error; needs frontend dev investigation in CorrectionDialog.jsx / SiteEngineerDashboard.jsx wiring. (2) acc-pc-reject button missing from the primary PM-Approved-Awaiting-Payment table on /accounts-board → Petty Cash Management (only renders on the SE drill-down secondary table). Use /app/test_reports/seed_petty_cash_correction.py to re-seed test rows after main agent fixes; testid IDs change each run because uuid suffix is random — log them from stdout.
rca of the issue: CorrectionDialog non-mounting bug RCA candidates: (a) Radix AlertDialog open-prop not propagating because parent re-render is not happening when correctionPC state changes — could be caused by a parent React.memo, or a setState during render swallowing the update; (b) the CorrectionDialog returns null if !doc, but `correctionPC` is set to the full pc row, so doc shouldn't be null; (c) the useEffect dependency `doc?.[Object.keys(doc || {})[0]]` could throw on first render if Object.keys order is undefined for the proxy. Reproduction: login as engineer@constructionos.com → Petty Cash tab → click red banner on any 'accountant_rejected' row → expect dialog with reason + Edit button; observed: nothing renders, no portal mount, no console error. Suggested mitigation: add a useEffect(() => console.log('CD open=', open, 'doc=', doc), [open, doc]) inside CorrectionDialog and a console.log inside the banner onClick to confirm setCorrectionPC fires; verify the AlertDialog from ./ui/alert-dialog accepts `open` (not `defaultOpen` only).
